handoff.handoffNotes: SlideOver component was already fully implemented (Tasks 4/5/14). All 14 acceptance criteria verified against existing code. Created 12 focused E2E tests covering portal rendering, slide animation, backdrop click, Escape key, focus trapping, dark mode, compound sub-components (Header/Body/Footer), and onClose callback. All 12 tests pass. Full regression suite: 224 passed, 8 pre-existing failures in task-7.1-validation.spec.ts (hardcoded port 5174 — known issue). No source code changes needed.
